text: - Approximately 470 English majors. Roughly half to 2/3 are dual majors in Education. Roughly half of our majors enter as transfer students. Our majors have had great success in a wide variety of careers and in graduate school. Our majors score above state average on Praxis 2 in subject matter Two recent graduates earned a perfect score on Praxis. • Three students have recently won Fulbright Awards, to South Korea (2007), Spain (2009), and South Africa (2010) • One 2010 graduate earned a prestigious book contract for a memoir (Alice Ozma, The Reading Promise) ● See our Department Website (prospective student link) for information on careers for English Majors.
